name: Hetch Hetchy / O'Shaughnessy Dam
summary_en: The archive documents trace O'Shaughnessy Dam and the Hetch Hetchy reservoir from construction through operation, including a 1999 history noting the contract to build the dam was awarded in 1920, a 1935 report on "San Francisco water and power," and 1930s Public Utilities Commission reports recording work such as the enlargement of O'Shaughnessy Dam. Later annual reports of the Hetch Hetchy Water and Power System document its budget and appropriations. The system is operated by the Public Utilities Commission, whose FY2025 budget line is $1.8B; a city contract for "Auto Parts for Hetch Hetchy" with Pine Mountain Auto Inc has been paid $29K to date.
